query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks drop after chip selloff, oil gains
articles.description: Asian stocks declined as chipmakers pulled down Wall Street amid valuation concerns. Oil prices climbed higher this week due to escalating Middle East hostilities. Investors are questioning the sustainability of massive artificial intelligence investments and tech valuations. Heightened geopolitical tensions fueled inflation worries and potential interest rate hikes. Consumers continue spending and the labor market shows resilience despite economic challenges.

articles.title: US strikes bridges in Iran, expanding its airstrike campaign over the Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: United States airstrikes on bridges intensified, escalating tensions with Iran. Iran launched new missile attacks against allied nations, and the interim ceasefire collapsed. The ongoing conflict for control of the Strait of Hormuz has caused significant casualties. Iranian officials warned of widespread attacks if the US interfered in the strait. The situation has led to soaring oil prices and increased regional instability.

articles.title: Dollar's Dance: Inflation, Global Tensions, and the Fed's Next Move
articles.description: The dollar steadied but faces a weekly decline due to softer U.S. inflation, leading traders to adjust rate hike bets. Escalating U.S.-Iran tensions supported safe-haven bids, pushing oil prices up. Currency movements showed a struggling yen, a rising euro, and steadying sterling amidst geopolitical uncertainties.

articles.title: Trump threatens new Iran escalation and risks repeating old mistakes
articles.description: President Trump has increased U.S. air strikes on Iran, but strategy shows little success. An interim ceasefire deal has collapsed, leaving the U.S. in a difficult situation. Iran has threatened to involve its allies in Yemen if strikes continue. Analysts believe escalation will not compel Iran to change its position. The crisis has driven up global oil prices and impacted financial markets.

articles.title: Iran-US war LIVE updates: US ‘winning big in Iran’ - Trump says benefits of war to be visible soon as military strikes critical infrastructure
articles.description: Iran war latest news on July 17 details US airstrikes on Iran, missile interceptions in Jordan and Kuwait, threats over the Strait of Hormuz, and rising global oil prices amid escalating tensions.

articles.title: Rs 100 for houses, Rs 5,000 for petrol pumps: Cash-strapped Bihar now lets panchayats collect holding tax
articles.description: With over 45,000 revenue villages in the state, govt targets revenue collection of Rs 1,300 crore from rural taxes.

articles.title: Gold prices face turbulence as oil, Fed risks increase
articles.description: Renewed hostility between the US and Iran could cause global gold prices to plunge to US$3,600-3,800 an ounce, or 60,000 baht per baht-weight for domestic gold bar, especially if oil prices rise to $90-100 a barrel and remain at that level for more than a month, according to Thailand's leading gold trader MTS Gold.

articles.title: Oil settles lower, near one-month high on US-Iran tensions
articles.description: Oil prices settled about 1% lower on Thursday but remained near their highest level since mid-June as the Iran war escalated, with Tehran asking Yemen's Houthi movement to be prepared to close the Red Sea oil export route.

articles.title: China Could Be About to Remove Oil's Biggest Safety Net
articles.description: Global oil market buffers are rapidly disappearing, with low inventories, disrupted Strait of Hormuz shipments, and dwindling excess supplies raising the risk of higher oil prices.
